name: Southwestern Fries (Gr)
recipeIngredient: 4 large potatoes, sliced lengthwise into very thin shoestring strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ancho chile powder, ground cumin, and salt in a bowl.
2. Heat the peanut oil to 375 degrees Fahrenheit (or until a small piece of potato sizzles when added).
3. Fry the potatoes in batches for about 3 minutes, or until they are crisp and golden brown.
4. Drain the fried potatoes on paper towels.
5. Immediately season with the spice mixture and serve.
